svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="drawio"> <diagram id="study-pipeline" name="/study 四步学习流水线"> <mxGraphModel dx="-504" dy="-117" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="960" pageHeight="300" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="step1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top" value="📖 学习材料" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="200" x="40" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step1desc" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fillColor=none;align=center;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#64748b" value="概述+概念+代码+陷阱+对比" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="40" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top" value="🧪 知识检测" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="200" x="280" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step2desc" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fillColor=none;align=center;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#64748b" value="5-8题逐题作答+评分+讲解" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="280" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top" value="🎤 模拟面试" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="200" x="520" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step3desc" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fillColor=none;align=center;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#64748b" value="3-5轮追问+点评+复盘" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="520" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top" value="📝 自动归档" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="760" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step4desc" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fillColor=none;align=center;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#64748b" value="日志+评分+错题+清单" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="160" x="760" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="step1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2" target="step2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="step2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2" target="step3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="step3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2" target="step4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
